name: Coding Agents
description: Headless harnesses for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode. Lets the host agent delegate tasks to other coding-agent CLIs in headless mode. Each ProjectRose chat session maps 1:1 to a CLI session, so follow-up tool calls in the same chat resume the same sub-agent conversation.
author: ProjectRose

tools.name: claude_code
tools.description: Delegate a coding task to Claude Code (Anthropic) running in headless mode. Sub-agent session resumes across calls in the same chat.

tools.name: codex
tools.description: Delegate a coding task to the OpenAI Codex CLI in headless mode. Sub-agent session resumes across calls in the same chat.

tools.name: opencode
tools.description: Delegate a coding task to OpenCode running in headless mode. Sub-agent session resumes across calls in the same chat.
